title: This n8n Sales Automation Won $5,000 in Just 14 days

extracted.hook: So, I just hopped off a call with the winner of our September hackathon who won $5,000 for building this sales system.

accelerate: discussing the $5,000 prize and Brett's background
slow: explaining the problem of missed calls

extracted.cta: Thanks so much Brett. It was great to great to chat with you today.
signature_phrases: you guys did a great job on this one
transitions: So, let's not waste any time and get straight into the video.
Now I'm here with Brett to showcase his winning solution, dive into the tech stack he used, and why he ended up winning the $5,000 prize.
And then do we have a phase seven down here for that sort of extra piece where it's doing the lookup?
So, um, this system helps convert missed calls into booked appointments so you can stay focused in the important things in your day and let this fill your calendar without lifting a finger.
But Brett, as we're sort of wrapping up here, wanted to give you a chance to to tell everyone if they want to work with you, if they're curious about learning more about you, where can they find you?
analogies: "it's like if a phone number is there and they can call or text it, you need to be prepared to be able to receive that or else somebody's going to go elsewhere"

"it really just kind of like completely blew my mind"
you guys did a great job on this one
